zh.lifeSummary: 當Richilde von Staufen於大約1097年出生在德國爾特波格格皮根格皮根時，她的父親Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben8歲，母親Agnes von Saarbrücken-16歲。她於1117年與Hugh I de Roucy結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1154年在法國皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Staufen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: variant of   Stauffer  . Compare   Stoufer  .

variants.name: Stauffer
meanings: occupational name for a maker or seller of beakers or mugs, from an agent derivative of Middle High German stouf ‘beaker, stoup’.

habitational name for someone from any of various minor places called with this word, for example Stauf, Staufen; the reference is to hills thought to resemble a beaker in shape. Compare   Stouffer  .

en.lifeSummary: When Richilde von Staufen was born about 1097, in Göppingen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben, was 8 and her mother, Agnes von Saarbrücken, was -16. She married Hugh I de Roucy in 1117. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1154, in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richilde von Staufen est née environ 1097, à Göppingen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Saarbrücken, avait -16 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh I de Roucy en 1117. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1154, à Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richilde von Staufen um 1097 in Göppingen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben 8 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Saarbrücken -16. Sie hat 1117 Hugh I de Roucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1154 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde von Staufen è nata il circa 1097 nel Göppingen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Saarbrücken, aveva -16 anni. Lei sposato Hugh I de Roucy nel 1117. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1154, nel Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richilde von Staufenが約1097年にドイツウuルッテンバーググoップインジェングoップインジェンで生まれた時，父Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwabenは8歳，母Agnes von Saarbrückenは-16歳であった。1117年にHugh I de Roucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1154年にフランスピカーディソンメモントディディエルで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richilde von Staufen(이)가 대략 1097년 독일 wu르테버그 그o핀겐 그o핀겐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Saarbrücken(은)는 -16세였다. 그녀는 1117년 Hugh I de Roucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1154년 프랑스 피카디 솜 몽디디어에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde von Staufen nasceu aproximadamente 1097, em Göppingen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Saarbrücken, tinha -16 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh I de Roucy em 1117. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1154, em Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richilde von Staufen родилась около 1097 г. в местности гoппинген, гoппинген, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Saarbrücken, -16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh I de Roucy в 1117 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1154 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Agnes von Saarbrücken, tenía -16 años. Se casó con Hugh I de Roucy en 1117. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1154, en Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
